title: HITL Gate Policy Metadata
description: Schema for human-in-the-loop gate metadata embedded in skill frontmatter.

risk_tier.description: Policy risk tier for this gate.

approval_trigger.description: Concrete condition that requires escalation to a human approver.

approver_role.description: Role accountable for reviewing and approving the gated action.

action_scope.description: Surface area of actions controlled by this gate (for example deployment, external data mutation, customer communications).
